title: End-to-end demonstration: scaffold + agent on a real ReScience repo

loop.result: ImportError: attempted relative import with no known parent package
re-ran as `python -m gabni.cli`; relative-import error cleared
argparse: 'the following arguments are required: --input' -> STOPPED with structured hand-off
named entry point, module invocation, and pointed agent to README for required flags

significance: Proves the tool-first reframe concretely: the fixed scaffold does the mechanical work reliably and stops honestly with an actionable hand-off; the agent does the irreducible judgment step (find data, read usage). Neither alone reproduces this repo; together they do. This is a real ReScience-C paper's code, not a synthetic fixture.
note_on_correctness: 'Runs to completion' — rung 1/2. Whether these edge-inference numbers MATCH the paper's published values (rung 3) is NOT asserted; that is the human's call, by design.
